capabilities.title: 添加 Coincident Mate

output_schema.description: Add a coincident mate between named planes/features inside two assembly components.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_add_coincident_mate through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 添加组件

output_schema.description: Add an existing part/subassembly to the active assembly, optionally fixing it.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_add_component through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 添加 Concentric Mate

output_schema.description: Add a concentric mate between two components by locating matching cylinder faces.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_add_concentric_mate through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 添加 Distance Mate

output_schema.description: Add a distance mate between named planes/features inside two assembly components.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_add_distance_mate through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 添加 Rotary Motor

output_schema.description: Create a Motion Study on the active assembly and add a constant-speed rotary motor by cylinder faces.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_add_rotary_motor through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 关闭文档

output_schema.description: Close the active document or all documents in the current SolidWorks session.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_close_documents through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 连接 SolidWorks

output_schema.description: Connect to a running SolidWorks instance or start one, then return active document status.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_connect through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 创建基础零件

output_schema.description: Create a simple cylinder or box part with optional color and save path.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_create_basic_part through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 导出活动文档

output_schema.description: Export the active SolidWorks document to STEP, STL, IGES, Parasolid, PDF, or DXF.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_export_active through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 健康检查

output_schema.description: Check Python dependencies, SolidWorks COM registration, optional live connection, and Motion typelib.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_health_check through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 新建文档

output_schema.description: Create a new part, assembly, or drawing document from a SolidWorks template.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_new_document through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 打开文档

output_schema.description: Open a SolidWorks document by absolute path and make it available for later MCP tools.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_open_document through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 审查活动文档

output_schema.description: Export preview BMPs and a JSON review report for the active SolidWorks document.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_review_active through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 保存文档

output_schema.description: Save the active SolidWorks document, optionally using Save As.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_save_document through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 设置外观

output_schema.description: Set appearance color on the active document or an assembly component.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_set_appearance through serialized backend execution.

capabilities.title: 固定组件

output_schema.description: Fix or float a component in the active assembly by component name keyword.

capabilities.test_case: Call upstream MCP tool solidworks_set_component_fixed through serialized backend execution.
